action.reasoning: Observation: v3.pt got 0.6146 alone — worse than best.pt's 0.6644. So best.pt remains the winner. Have 2.4h, 13 iters. Analysis: Single best.pt with multi-scale TTA + flip is best. Try ensembling best.pt + v3.pt to see if averaging helps (v3 has different seed and 1 more epoch, complementary). Also try logit adjustment based on training class priors to better handle test imbalance. Decision: Modify predict.py to ensemble best.pt + v3.pt (specified via comma in checkpoint arg), submit eval.
